description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped stone with a rugged, angular form and a mix of earthy tones. Its surface displays a combination of rough, granular textures and smoother, weathered patches, with visible color transitions from ochre and tan to off-white. The stone appears to have been naturally fractured, with some faces showing more pronounced flatness and others more jagged, uneven contours. Subtle layering and mottling are evident, suggesting mineral deposits and natural weathering processes. The stone's mass and density are typical of sedimentary or metamorphic rocks commonly found in urban landscaping or as natural barriers. Its overall appearance is robust and solid, making it suitable for use as an obstacle or decorative element in parks, sidewalks, or urban green spaces.
description: A rugged, irregular stone with earthy ochre, tan, and off-white tones, featuring rough and weathered surfaces. Its angular form and natural texture make it suitable as an urban obstacle or decorative barrier.
description_view_0: This view highlights the stone's most angular and rugged face, with prominent ochre and tan coloration and a rough, granular texture.
description_view_1: This side shows a flatter, broader surface with more off-white and pale tan areas, and subtle mottling from mineral deposits.
description_view_2: This angle reveals the smoothest face, predominantly off-white, with minimal visible texture and a gentle slope.
description_view_3: This view presents a blockier, more rectangular aspect, with a mix of rough ochre and smoother white surfaces.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or obstacle on the ground
attribute_pattern: Irregular mottling and subtle layering with natural mineral veining; no artificial carvings or regular patterns.
attribute_weathering: Rough and weathered with some smoother patches, indicating moderate exposure to natural elements and abrasion.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts moderately with manicured urban surfaces but can blend with other natural stones or landscaping elements; may be partially surrounded by grass or soil.
